posts.text:
I received the good news this afternoon that FEMA officially granted our appeal after I met with the president earlier this week. This will help lower costs for Michiganders who have shouldered the burden for utility repairs.


Detroit Free Press (@freep)

Gov. Whitmer meets with Trump, secures emergency aid, talk Great Lakes 
📸 Provided By Matthew Clara, Michigan Department Of Natural Resources
freep.com/story/news/politic…





— https://nitter.net/freep/status/2031503990081380473#m

posts.text:
Antisemitism is hate, plain and simple. It has no home here in Michigan.

Now more than ever, we must hold each other closer and choose love over hate. Michigan has and will always be stronger together.
posts.quote:
Antisemitism is hate, plain and simple. It has no home here in Michigan.

Now more than ever, we must hold each other closer and choose love over hate. Michigan has and will always be stronger together.

posts.text:
Michigan is at its best when we are together. What I saw following yesterday's attack was a Michigan that shows up when tragedy strikes and stands beside our neighbors. 

No attempt to divide us will break that.
posts.quote:
Michigan is at its best when we are together. What I saw following yesterday's attack was a Michigan that shows up when tragedy strikes and stands beside our neighbors. 

No attempt to divide us will break that.

posts.text:
We are wishing the hero who was injured a speedy recovery.
 
As we process this awful attack, let's wrap our arms around West Bloomfield and our state's Jewish community. We are stronger together.
posts.quote:
We are wishing the hero who was injured a speedy recovery.

posts.text: Today's attack is every community's worst nightmare. We saw incredible people step up today to save lives and stop the suspect. Our state is grateful to the security personnel for their bravery and law enforcement who jumped into action to keep students safe.
posts.quote: Today's attack is every community's worst nightmare. We saw incredible people step up today to save lives and stop the suspect. Our state is grateful to the security personnel for their bravery and law enforcement who jumped into action to keep students safe.

posts.text: Now, the Supreme Court has ruled that a large swath of the administration’s tariffs are illegal. Congress must act to rein in these irresponsible tariff policies and put more money back in Michiganders’ pockets.
posts.quote: Now, the Supreme Court has ruled that a large swath of the administration’s tariffs are illegal. Congress must act to rein in these irresponsible tariff policies and put more money back in Michiganders’ pockets.

posts.text:
In the wake of the Supreme Court decision on Trump's tariffs, I led 19 states in calling on Congress to work on a more strategic, commonsense trade policy.

Tariffs have jacked up costs on cars, food, and housing, and Michiganders are paying the price. wnem.com/2026/03/11/whitmer-…

posts.text:
It shouldn’t be so hard to build the homes people need in the places they want to live.
 
It’s time we make it easier to build homes by cutting red tape, streamlining zoning, and improving building codes. Let’s get this done so we can build more homes quicker, at a lower cost.
posts.quote:
It shouldn’t be so hard to build the homes people need in the places they want to live.
 
It’s time we make it easier to build homes by cutting red tape, streamlining zoning, and improving building codes. Let’s get this done so we can build more homes quicker, at a lower cost.

posts.text: Michiganders deserve real relief from medical debt. I'm ready to take action by:✅Capping interest rates✅Keeping medical debt off your credit report✅Requiring hospitals to set up financial assistance programs✅Banning liens or foreclosures on homes because of medical debt
posts.quote: Michiganders deserve real relief from medical debt. I'm ready to take action by:✅Capping interest rates✅Keeping medical debt off your credit report✅Requiring hospitals to set up financial assistance programs✅Banning liens or foreclosures on homes because of medical debt

posts.text:
I’m laser focused on investing in the issues that move our state forward. I want to create more good-paying jobs, diversify our economy, develop our workforce, and build vibrant communities all across the state. 

Let’s keep working together to grow Michigan’s economy.
posts.quote:

Let’s keep working together to grow Michigan’s economy.

posts.text:
Every Michigander deserves to feel safe in the community they call home. This year, I proposed more investments in our public safety, support for our veterans, and safeguards for our air, land, and water to do exactly that -- keep you safe.

Let’s get it done.
